productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Rnm Casual Brown Floater
description: Casual look, stylish touch - that's what these leather and suede sandals from red tape have to offer. Perfect for those casual days, these are all that you need to pamper your feet. Upper Wide leather strap covering the midfoot for durability, breathability and comfort Wide backfoot strap made of leather and attached to the forefoot strap with elastic inserts to lock the foot in place and to offer a snug, customised Fit Padded fabric inner for a comfortable wear and to prevent blistering Stitch detailing on the upper for durability and style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Cushioned suede footbed for all-day comfort Footbed stitched to the midsole for enhanced durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole with leaf midrib pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Curved midfoot and forefoot for ergonomic comfort shoe careUse a suede brush to dust dirt off suede surfaceUse a nubuck brush to dust dirt off nubuck surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
